metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4849
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, 2: Lysosomes marked by LAMP1 and LysoTracker were both identified in postsynaptic spines of dissociated hippocampal cultures. Furthermore, this was confirmed with APEX2 (Fig. 3).

"We found lysosomes not only in the cell body and dendrites (Fig. 1 E) but also in dendritic spines (Fig. 1, F and G). Upon quantification, ~7% of spines have a lysosome in the head of the spine (Fig. 1 H)."

Based on the known transmembrane topology of this protein, "integral component of ... membrane" term was selected.. Experimental description: M&M: "Dissociated hippocampal neurons from postnatal day 1 Sprague-Dawley of either sex as described previously"

antibody:
LAMP1 (1:400; ab24170; Abcam)
LAMP1-GFP, LAMP1-RFP and mCherry was a gift from S. Roy (University of California, San Diego, La Jolla, CA)
